labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Human Pages" provides 31 tools for dns & networking tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "DNS & Networking" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: search_humans
tools.description: Search for humans available for hire. Supports filtering by skill, equipment, language, location (text or coordinates), and rate. Returns profiles with reputation stats. Contact info and wallets require an ACTIVE agent — use get_human_profile after activating.

location.description: Filter by location name or neighborhood (partial match, e.g., "San Francisco" or "Mission District")

lat.description: Latitude for radius search (requires lng and radius)

lng.description: Longitude for radius search (requires lat and radius)

radius.description: Search radius in kilometers (requires lat and lng)

max_rate.description: Maximum hourly rate in USD. Humans who set rates in other currencies are auto-converted to USD for comparison.

available_only.description: Only return humans who are currently available (default: true)

work_mode.description: Filter by work mode preference (REMOTE, ONSITE, or HYBRID)

verified.description: Filter by verification status. Use "humanity" to only return humans who have verified their identity via Gitcoin Passport (score >= 20).

tools.name: get_human
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific human by their ID, including their bio, skills, and service offerings. Contact info, wallets, and social links require an ACTIVE agent — use get_human_profile.

id.description: The unique ID of the human

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register as an agent on Human Pages. Returns an API key that you MUST save and use for all subsequent job creation calls. The API key cannot be retrieved later.

name.description: Display name for your agent (e.g., "Acme AI Assistant")

description.description: Brief description of what your agent does (max 500 chars)

website_url.description: Your website URL (can be verified later for a trust badge)

contact_email.description: Contact email for the agent operator

tools.name: get_agent_profile
tools.description: Get a registered agent's public profile including reputation stats (total jobs, completed jobs, payment speed).

tools.name: verify_agent_domain
tools.description: Verify domain ownership for a registered agent. The agent must have a websiteUrl set. Supports two methods: "well-known" (place a file at /.well-known/humanpages-verify.txt) or "dns" (add a TXT record at _humanpages.yourdomain.com).

agent_key.description: The agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: create_job_offer
tools.description: Create a job offer for a human. Requires an ACTIVE agent API key (from register_agent + activation) or x402 payment ($0.25 USDC on Base via x-payment header). RATE LIMITS: BASIC tier = 1 offer/2 days, PRO tier = 15 offers/day. x402 payments bypass tier limits. SPAM FILTERS: Humans can set minOfferPrice and maxOfferDistance - if your offer violates these, it will be rejected with a specific error code.

human_id.description: The ID of the human to hire

description.description: Detailed description of what needs to be done

price_usdc.description: Agreed price in USDC. Must meet the human's minOfferPrice if set.

agent_key.description: Your registered agent API key (starts with hp_). Required.

agent_name.description: Display name override (defaults to registered agent name)

agent_lat.description: Agent latitude for distance filtering. Required if human has maxOfferDistance set.

agent_lng.description: Agent longitude for distance filtering. Required if human has maxOfferDistance set.

callback_url.description: Webhook URL to receive job status updates (ACCEPTED, REJECTED, PAID, COMPLETED). Must be a public HTTP(S) endpoint.

callback_secret.description: Secret for HMAC-SHA256 signature verification (min 16 chars). The signature is sent in X-HumanPages-Signature header.

payment_mode.description: Payment mode. ONE_TIME (default) for single payments. STREAM for ongoing stream payments.

payment_timing.description: For ONE_TIME jobs only. "upfront" (default) = pay before work. "upon_completion" = pay after work is done.

stream_method.description: Stream method. SUPERFLUID: agent creates an on-chain flow that streams tokens per-second. MICRO_TRANSFER: agent sends periodic discrete transfers. Required when payment_mode=STREAM.

stream_interval.description: How often payments are made/checkpointed. Required when payment_mode=STREAM.

stream_rate_usdc.description: USDC amount per interval (e.g., 10 = $10/day if interval=DAILY). Required when payment_mode=STREAM.

stream_max_ticks.description: Optional cap on number of payment intervals. Null = indefinite.

tools.name: get_job_status
tools.description: Check the status of a job offer. Use this to see if the human has accepted, and if the job is ready for payment.

job_id.description: The job ID returned from create_job_offer

tools.name: mark_job_paid
tools.description: Record that payment has been sent for an ACCEPTED job. The job must be accepted by the human first. Payment amount must match or exceed the agreed price.

tools.name: check_humanity_status
tools.description: Check the humanity verification status for a specific human. Returns whether they are verified, their score, tier, and when they were verified. This is read-only.

human_id.description: The ID of the human to check

tools.name: leave_review
tools.description: Leave a review for a COMPLETED job. Reviews are only allowed after the human marks the job as complete.

tools.name: get_human_profile
tools.description: Get the full profile of a human including contact info, wallet addresses, and social links. Requires an ACTIVE agent API key. Alternative: agents can pay $0.05 per view via x402 (USDC on Base) by including an x-payment header — no activation needed.

agent_key.description: Your registered agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: request_activation_code
tools.description: Request an activation code (HP-XXXXXXXX) to post on social media for free BASIC tier activation. After posting, use verify_social_activation with the post URL.

agent_key.description: Your registered agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: verify_social_activation
tools.description: Verify a social media post containing your activation code. On success, your agent is activated with BASIC tier.

agent_key.description: Your registered agent API key (starts with hp_)

post_url.description: URL of the social media post containing your activation code

tools.name: get_activation_status
tools.description: Check the current activation status, tier, and expiry for your agent.

agent_key.description: Your registered agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: get_payment_activation
tools.description: Get a deposit address and payment instructions for PRO tier activation via on-chain payment.

agent_key.description: Your registered agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: verify_payment_activation
tools.description: Verify an on-chain payment for PRO tier activation. On success, your agent is activated with PRO tier.

agent_key.description: Your registered agent API key (starts with hp_)

tx_hash.description: The on-chain transaction hash of the activation payment

tools.name: start_stream
tools.description: Start a stream payment for an ACCEPTED stream job. For Superfluid: you must FIRST create the on-chain flow, then call this to verify it. Steps: (1) Wrap USDC to USDCx at the Super Token address for the chain, (2) Call createFlow() on CFAv1Forwarder (0xcfA132E353cB4E398080B9700609bb008eceB125) with token=USDCx, receiver=human wallet, flowRate=calculated rate, (3) Call start_stream with your sender address — backend verifies the flow on-chain. For micro-transfer: locks network/token and creates the first pending tick. Prefer L2s (Base, Arbitrum, Polygon) for lower gas costs.

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

sender_address.description: Your wallet address that created the flow (Superfluid) or will send payments (micro-transfer)

tools.name: record_stream_tick
tools.description: Record a micro-transfer stream payment. Submit the transaction hash for the current pending tick. Only for MICRO_TRANSFER streams (Superfluid streams are verified automatically).

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

tx_hash.description: The on-chain transaction hash for this tick payment

tools.name: pause_stream
tools.description: Pause an active stream. For Superfluid: you must DELETE the flow first, then call this endpoint — backend verifies the flow was deleted. For micro-transfer: skips the current pending tick.

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: resume_stream
tools.description: Resume a paused stream. For Superfluid: create a new flow first, then call this — backend verifies. For micro-transfer: creates a new pending tick.

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

sender_address.description: Wallet address for the new flow (Superfluid only, optional if same as before)

tools.name: stop_stream
tools.description: Stop a stream permanently and mark the job as completed. Can be called by agent or human on STREAMING or PAUSED jobs.

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: send_job_message
tools.description: Send a message on a job. Agents can message the human they hired, and vice versa. Works on PENDING, ACCEPTED, PAID, STREAMING, and PAUSED jobs. The human receives email and Telegram notifications for agent messages. Rate limit: 10 messages/minute.

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: get_job_messages
tools.description: Get all messages for a job, ordered chronologically. Returns messages from both the agent and the human. Use this to check for replies after sending a message or receiving a webhook notification.

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: create_listing
tools.description: Post a job listing on the Human Pages job board for humans to discover and apply to. Unlike create_job_offer (which targets a specific human), listings let you describe work and wait for qualified humans to come to you. Requires an ACTIVE agent or x402 payment ($0.50 USDC). RATE LIMITS: BASIC = 1 listing/week, PRO = 5 listings/day. x402 bypasses limits.

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

title.description: Title of the listing (e.g., "Social media promotion for AI product")

description.description: Detailed description of the work, expectations, and deliverables

location.description: Location name for the work (e.g., "San Francisco")

radius_km.description: Radius in km for location-based filtering

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiration date (must be in future, max 90 days). Example: "2025-03-01T00:00:00Z"

max_applicants.description: Maximum number of applicants before listing auto-closes

callback_secret.description: Secret for HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature (min 16 chars)

tools.name: get_listings
tools.description: Browse open job listings on the Human Pages job board. Returns listings with agent reputation and application counts. Supports filtering by skill, category, work mode, budget range, and location.

skill.description: Filter by required skill (comma-separated for multiple, e.g., "photography,editing")

radius.description: Radius in km for location-based filtering

tools.name: get_listing
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific listing, including the posting agent's reputation and application count.

tools.name: get_listing_applications
tools.description: View applications for a listing you created. Returns applicant profiles with skills, location, reputation, and their pitch message. Use this to evaluate candidates before making an offer.

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: make_listing_offer
tools.description: Make a job offer to a listing applicant. This creates a standard job from the listing and notifies the human. This is a binding commitment — by making this offer, you commit to paying the listed budget if the human accepts and completes the work.

application_id.description: The application ID of the chosen applicant

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: cancel_listing
tools.description: Cancel an open listing. All pending applications will be rejected. Only the agent who created the listing can cancel it.

agent_key.description: Your agent API key (starts with hp_)

tools.name: get_promo_status
tools.description: Check the launch promo status — free PRO tier for the first 100 agents. Returns how many slots are claimed and remaining. No authentication required.

tools.name: claim_free_pro_upgrade
tools.description: Claim a free PRO tier upgrade via the launch promo (first 100 agents). Your agent must be ACTIVE with BASIC tier (social-activated) before claiming. On success, your tier is upgraded to PRO with 60-day duration.

agent_key.description: Your registered agent API key (starts with hp_)
